audience: Estate agents, property developers, architects, landlords and owners considering aerial photography for sales, lettings or project communications
primaryDutchSearchIntent: Vastgoedprofessionals helpen bepalen wanneer luchtfoto's meerwaarde bieden en hoe zij een volledige, eerlijke en uitvoerbare vastgoedreportage voorbereiden

searchIntent.question: When does real estate drone photography add value, and how should a useful and compliant shoot be planned?
searchIntent.geographicContext: Property projects in Belgium, subject to current Belgian and European drone rules

longTailKeywords: real estate drone photography shot list
directAnswer: Real estate drone photography is most useful when buyers or tenants need to understand the relationship between a building, its plot, access, outdoor areas and surroundings. Plan a compact shot list, verify current flight and privacy conditions, and present the location honestly rather than using height for effect.
title: Real estate drone photography: shot list, rules and preparation
metaDescription: Plan real estate drone photography with a useful shot list, honest perspective, Belgian flight checks, privacy controls and practical delivery formats.
h1: Real estate drone photography: shot list, rules and preparation
factsToPreserve: The legal sections provide general orientation, not legal advice or permission for a specific flight
Property-owner or agent permission does not replace aviation or geozone requirements
The stated Open category conditions include a general 120 metre ceiling and direct visual line of sight
A drone image does not establish a legal plot boundary
Flight feasibility depends on the current operation, aircraft, people, geozones, weather and location
Receiving image files does not automatically grant unrestricted third-party reuse
